stemHtml: State B requires visas from State A passengers. As a pilot arriving in State B, do you need a visa per ICAO Annex 9?

options.a: Yes — visa rules apply to everyone including crew.
options.b: Yes — a CMC doesn't exempt you.
options.c: No — crew with valid passports are exempt.
options.d: No — your Crew Member Certificate exempts you from visa requirements.
